function.name: search_orders
function.description: Search customer orders by order ID, email address, or phone number. Returns a list of matching orders with basic information.

order_id.description: The order ID to search for, e.g. 'ORD-20240115-001'

email.description: Customer email address to search associated orders

phone.description: Customer phone number to search associated orders

function.name: get_order_status
function.description: Get detailed status of a specific order including shipping, delivery, payment, and item information.

order_id.description: The order ID to query status for

function.name: refund_order
function.description: Process a refund for a specific order. Must be confirmed by the customer before execution. Refunds go to the original payment method.

amount.description: Refund amount in USD. Must not exceed the original order total.

function.name: escalate_to_human
function.description: Escalate the current conversation to a human customer service agent. Use when the issue is beyond AI scope, involves legal/security matters, or customer explicitly requests human assistance.

summary.description: Brief summary of the conversation and issue for the human agent

function.name: search_faq
function.description: Search the frequently asked questions knowledge base for answers to common customer questions about shipping, returns, payments, accounts, etc.

query.description: Search query for the FAQ knowledge base
